tickets.title: Define --update migration behavior and safety checks
tickets.description: Specify how --update detects existing AgentOps-managed directories, confirms intent, and handles missing/partial legacy files.

tickets.title: Add --update flag parsing to zed-agentops-init.sh
tickets.description: Extend CLI parsing to accept --update, preserve existing behavior when flag is absent, and route to migration flow.

tickets.title: Implement legacy cleanup for update flow
Create journal/snapshot/checkpoint files in update flow
tickets.description: Ensure .agent/journal.jsonl, .agent/snapshot.json, and .agent/checkpoint.json are created with the current schema.

tickets.title: Update .rules template for v0.1.1 migration
tickets.description: Revise .rules content to reflect current persistence files and update guidance applied in --update.

tickets.title: Verify update flow on existing managed directory
tickets.description: Run a manual verification checklist covering legacy file removal, new file creation, and .rules update.

tickets.title: Add post-commit snapshot/checkpoint hook
tickets.description: On successful commit, persist snapshot.json and checkpoint.json with the latest state/last_applied_seq; handle failures gracefully and no-op when state is unavailable.
